notableEvents.label: Yordan Alvarez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Yordan Alvarez grounds into a double play, second baseman Cole Young to shortstop J.P. Crawford to first baseman Josh Naylor. Jose Altuve out at 2nd. Yordan Alvarez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Zach Dezenzo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Zach Dezenzo flies out sharply to center fielder Julio Rodríguez.

notableEvents.label: Josh Naylor GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Josh Naylor grounds into a double play, third baseman Isaac Paredes to shortstop Braden Shewmake to first baseman Christian Walker. Julio Rodríguez out at 2nd. Josh Naylor out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Rob Refsnyder pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Rob Refsnyder singles on a line drive to right fielder Cam Smith.
